mapper.select: /* 설 명 : 금주강의조회 */ SELECT MIN(LCTR_WKNO) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_ORDER_MIN , MAX(LCTR_WKNO) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_ORDER_MAX , MIN(LCTR_WKNO_SYMD) AS LESSON_START_DT_MIN , MAX(LCTR_WKNO_EYMD) AS LESSON_END_DT_MAX FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN LCTR_WKNO_SYMD AND LCTR_WKNO_EYMD AND SBJCT_ID = #{subjectId} GROUP BY SBJCT_ID

/* 설 명 : 주차별강의일정목록조회 - with 학습활동포함 */
SELECT '주차' ACTV_TYCD, 'TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL' SRC_TBL, A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID ID , A.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO SEQNO, A.LCTR_WKNONM NM, A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 0 FIRST_ORD, 0 SCND_RORD FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL A WHERE #{subjectId} = A.SBJCT_ID UNION ALL SELECT '강의' ACTV_TYCD, 'TB_LMS_LCTR' SRC_TBL, A.LCTR_ID ID, A.LCTR_SEQNO SEQNO, A.LCTRNM NM, A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 1 SCND_RORD FROM TB_LMS_LCTR A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND 'SBJCT20260001' = LWS.SBJCT_ID UNION ALL SELECT '과제' ACTV_TYCD, 'TB_LMS_ASMT' SRC_TBL, A.ASMT_ID ID, 0 SEQNO, A.ASMT_TTL NM, A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 2 SCND_RORD FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND 'SBJCT20260001' = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE 'SBJCT20260001' = A.SBJCT_ID UNION ALL SELECT '토론' ACTV_TYCD, 'TB_LMS_DSCS' SRC_TBL, A.DSCS_ID ID, 0 SEQNO, A.DSCS_TTL NM, A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 3 SCND_RORD FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND 'SBJCT20260001' = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE 'SBJCT20260001' = A.SBJCT_ID UNION ALL SELECT '설문' ACTV_TYCD, 'TB_LMS_SRVY' SRC_TBL, A.SRVY_ID ID, 0 SEQNO, A.SRVY_TTL NM, A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 4 SCND_RORD FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND 'SBJCT20260001' = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE 'SBJCT20260001' = A.SBJCT_ID UNION ALL SELECT '세미나' ACTV_TYCD, 'TB_LMS_SMNR' SRC_TBL, A.SMNR_ID ID, 0 SEQNO, A.SMNRNM NM, A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 5 SCND_RORD FROM TB_LMS_SMNR A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND 'SBJCT20260001' = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE 'SBJCT20260001' = A.SBJCT_ID UNION ALL SELECT '자료' ACTV_TYCD, 'TB_LMS_BBS' SRC_TBL, '자료_ID' ID, 0 SEQNO, '자료이름' NM, 'WKNO001' LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 6 SCND_RORD FROM DUAL A ORDER BY LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, FIRST_ORD, SCND_RORD, SEQNO
